MICRO PROJECT – 03 · CO3 CO4 CO5

COVID-19 Data Analysis Application

End-to-end analytics pipeline — ingestion · preprocessing · statistical computation · trend visualisation · persistent storage · query retrieval

NumPy 2.4.2
Pandas 3.0.1
Dataset 2020-01-22 → 2023-05-11
Countries 10
SQLite Persistent DB
Industry Healthcare Informatics
